ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., Stock, Currency, Commodity) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading symbol of the asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is denominated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the asset is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the period */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Number of outstanding contracts */,
  "trading_hours" INTEGER /* Whether the data point is within trading hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being logged */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the status change */,
  "from_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the trade */,
  "to_status" TEXT /* New status of the trade */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the trade status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., description, website) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key for the preference (e.g., language, timezone) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
